The MOULDER decoy set1 was downloaded from https://salilab.org/decoys/; the I-TASSER decoy set-II was obtained from https://zhanglab.ccmb.med.umich.edu/decoys/decoy2.html; and the ROSETTA all-atom decoy set from https://zenodo.org/record/48780#.WvtCA63MzLF. All protein structures (including both native and decoys) were converted into their biological oligomerization state and prepared with the Protein Preparation Wizard,44 which adds missing atoms, optimizes the H-bond network, and performs energy minimization to clean up the structures for subsequent calculations.

name: Archaeon
description: Archaeon is a Python CLI that mines NCBI and MGnify for protein sequences from extreme environments, scores them by predicted industrial applicability, optionally annotates them via BLAST, predicts 3D structures using ESMFold, and generates a self-contained interactive HTML report.

name: protein-folding-nextflow
description: A multi-engine Nextflow pipeline evaluating single-point mutations across AlphaFold2, ESMFold, RoseTTAFold2, and OmegaFold. Incorporates an advanced biophysical scoring engine (VdW clashes, Kabsch RMSD, UniProt catalytic proximity mapping) to override AI structural prediction biases and accurately identify hidden functional knockouts.

name: Amp-Analysis-Platform
description: Built an AI-driven peptide discovery platform leveraging the ProtGPT2 large language model for de novo peptide sequence generation and ESMFold for accurate 3D structure prediction. The platform incorporates a comprehensive 21-parameter peptide evaluation framework based on peer-reviewed algorithms.

name: Drug-discovery
description: A virtual environment for collaborative preclinical trials, combining 3D modeling, AI, and interaction simulations. The solution utilizes technologies such as generative AI, ESMFold, AutoDock-Vina, Unity, and Blender to generate protein structures, predict drug ligands, identify binding sites, and simulate interactions in real-time.

name: Foldsmith_Copilot_
description: 🧬 FoldSmith Copilot  FoldSmith Copilot is an interactive AI-powered protein structure prediction and analysis tool that combines ESMFold, pLDDT confidence visualization, 3D molecular rendering, and a Hugging Face LLM copilot — all in a single Gradio interface.  Designed to run smoothly on Kaggle or local GPU environments.

name: STAYAHEAD
description: The goal of this repository is to give the user the tools for predicting protein structures with AlphaFold-2 and ESMFold on an HPC Slurm system. The protein structures are used to create a training dataset of structural features and empirical data for an XGB prediction model.

name: Frankenstein
description: This is a physics-based programme that uses predictions of protein structure generated by the ESMFold API, and improves upon their stability using physics-based methods, chiefly meta-dynamics which attempts to mimic the role of ATP/chaperone proteins in helping proteins reach their lowest-energy conformations.

name: PRo-EDICTOR
description: PRo-EDICTOR: Protein Structure Prediction PRo-EDICTOR is a Streamlit-based app that predicts and visualizes 3D protein structures using ESMFold. It features an interactive 3D viewer, analyzes key protein properties, and allows PDB file downloads. Built by the Department of Bioinformatics, it’s a powerful tool for protein folding insights.

name: Protein-Structure-Prediction-
description: This program is an explainable protein structure prediction web application built with Streamlit. It allows a user to input an amino-acid sequence, validates that sequence, runs a transformer-based protein folding model (ESMFold) to predict the 3D structure, and then presents both the predicted structure and model internals in an interpretable way.
